flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fort Hays State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.9k → $17.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fort Hays State University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (11.0k → 9.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fort Hays State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
